description_long: This is a mid-century modern style wooden cabinet or shelf, featuring a rectangular body elevated on four angled legs. The front side is open, revealing three compartments of varying sizes, suitable for storing books, electronics, or decorative items. The back panel is solid and features a subtle geometric pattern, providing structural support and visual interest. The sides are plain and flat, emphasizing the clean lines and minimalist design. The wood grain texture is visible throughout, giving the piece a natural and warm appearance. There are no visible handles, doors, or glass panels, and the overall construction appears sturdy and functional.
description: A mid-century modern wooden cabinet or shelf with open compartments and angled legs, featuring a natural wood grain finish and a patterned back panel.
description_view_0: The front view shows three open compartments of different sizes, supported by four angled legs.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the plain, flat side panel and the slim profile of the cabinet.
description_view_2: The back view reveals a solid panel with a subtle geometric pattern, with no openings or compartments visible.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the plain side and the angled legs.
